name: Across Protocol
description: Fast cross-chain bridge using UMA optimistic oracle. Intent-based design with relayers providing upfront capital.

name: Stargate (LayerZero)
description: Omnichain liquidity transport protocol built on LayerZero. Uses unified liquidity pools with delta algorithm for instant guaranteed finality.

name: LayerZero (Messaging)
description: Omnichain interoperability protocol enabling cross-chain messaging. V2 uses decoupled verification and execution with configurable DVNs (Decentralized Verifier Networks).
note: EndpointV2 uses the same address 0x1a44076050125825900e736c501f859c50fE728c on most EVM chains via CREATE2. Some newer chains use 0x6F475642a6e85809B1c36Fa62763669b1b48DD5B.

name: Wormhole
description: Cross-chain messaging protocol secured by a set of 19 Guardians. Supports token transfers via Portal (lock-and-mint) and arbitrary message passing.

name: Axelar
description: Full-stack cross-chain communication protocol with Proof-of-Stake validator set. Supports General Message Passing (GMP) and Interchain Token Service (ITS).

name: Hyperlane
description: Permissionless interoperability protocol. Allows anyone to deploy on any chain. Uses modular security via Interchain Security Modules (ISMs).
supportedTokens: Warp Route tokens - any ERC20 can be made interchain

name: Chainlink CCIP
description: Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol by Chainlink. Uses decentralized oracle networks with ARM (Anti-fraud Risk Management) network for security.

name: Celer cBridge
description: Cross-chain bridge using State Guardian Network (SGN). Supports both pool-based transfers and canonical token bridging via PegBridge.

name: Celer IM (Inter-chain Messaging)
description: Inter-chain messaging framework built on top of Celer SGN. Allows arbitrary cross-chain message passing and contract calls.

contracts.note: Uses same SGN infrastructure as cBridge. MessageBus contracts deployed on each chain.

name: Multichain (Anyswap)
description: COMPROMISED - July 2023: $125M+ exploit due to compromised private keys. Previously one of the largest bridges. CEO arrested. DO NOT USE.
supportedChains: Was deployed on 90+ chains - now deprecated

name: Hop Protocol
description: Bridge for L2-to-L2 transfers using hTokens and AMMs. Each supported asset has its own bridge and hToken variant.

name: Synapse Protocol
description: Cross-chain bridge using AMM pools with nUSD/nETH synthetic assets. Also supports CCTP integration for native USDC.

name: Connext (now Everclear)
description: Cross-chain liquidity protocol rebranded to Everclear. Uses intent-based architecture with clearing layer for netting cross-chain settlements.

name: deBridge
description: Cross-chain trading protocol with 0-TVL architecture. Uses intent-based DLN where takers fill orders on destination chains.

allEVMChains.note: Same addresses deployed across Ethereum(1), BNB(56), Polygon(137), Fantom(250), Arbitrum(42161), Avalanche(43114), Linea(59144), Optimism(10), Base(8453)

name: Orbiter Finance
description: Cross-rollup bridge using maker model. Transfers are EOA-to-EOA with identification codes appended to amounts. Extremely fast for rollup-to-rollup.

ethereum.note: Orbiter uses EOA maker addresses, not traditional bridge contracts

name: Rhino.fi (formerly DeversiFi)
description: Cross-chain liquidity layer for stablecoins. Built on StarkEx L2 with multi-chain bridge infrastructure.

name: Socket (Bungee)
description: Bridge aggregator that routes through multiple bridges (Stargate, Across, Hop, Celer, etc.) to find optimal routes. Uses modular route system.

multichain.note: Same address on Ethereum, Arbitrum, Avalanche, Base, BSC, Optimism, Polygon, Fantom, and more

supportedTokens: Any token supported by underlying bridges

name: LI.FI
description: Cross-chain bridge and DEX aggregator. Uses Diamond proxy pattern to integrate multiple bridges and DEXes in a single contract.

mostChains.note: Same address on most chains including Ethereum, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, Polygon, BSC, Avalanche, Fantom, Scroll

supportedTokens: Any token supported by underlying bridges and DEXes

name: Squid Router
type: cross-chain swap router (built on Axelar GMP)
description: Cross-chain swap and liquidity routing protocol built on Axelar. Routes through DEXes on source and destination chains with Axelar bridging in between.

multichain.note: Same address deployed across Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, Avalanche, BNB Chain, and more via Axelar

supportedTokens: Any token available on connected DEXes

name: Router Protocol
description: Cross-chain infrastructure with Router Chain as hub. Supports CrossTalk for messaging and Nitro for asset transfers.

contracts.note: Gateway contracts deployed per chain. See docs.routerprotocol.com/reference/contract-addresses for complete list.

name: Allbridge
description: Cross-chain bridge supporting both Classic (lock-and-mint) and Core (liquidity pool) modes. Uses own AMB, Circle CCTP, or Wormhole for messaging.

contracts.note: Contract addresses vary by chain and bridge mode (Classic vs Core). See docs-core.allbridge.io for details.

name: Poly Network
description: COMPROMISED - Hacked twice: August 2021 ($611M exploit, funds returned) and July 2023 (private keys compromised, 57 assets on 10 chains affected). DO NOT USE.
supportedChains: Was deployed on Ethereum, BNB, Polygon, Avalanche, Heco, OKX, Metis, and more
securityIncidents: July 2023: Private keys compromised, 57 crypto assets on 10 blockchains affected

name: Gnosis Bridge (AMB / Omnibridge)
description: Native bridge for Gnosis Chain (formerly xDai). Includes xDai Bridge (DAI<->xDAI), Omnibridge (arbitrary ERC-20s), and AMB (Arbitrary Message Bridge).

name: Polygon PoS Bridge
description: Native bridge for Polygon PoS. Uses validator checkpoints for security. Supports ETH, ERC-20, ERC-721, and ERC-1155 tokens.

name: Polygon zkEVM Bridge
description: Native bridge for Polygon zkEVM. Uses zero-knowledge proofs for verification. Supports ETH and ERC-20 tokens.

name: Arbitrum Bridge (Native)
description: Native canonical bridge for Arbitrum One. Uses optimistic fraud proofs with 7-day withdrawal period. Supports ETH and ERC-20 via Gateway Router.

name: Optimism Bridge (Native)
description: Native canonical bridge for OP Mainnet. Uses Bedrock architecture with L1StandardBridge and CrossDomainMessenger. 7-day withdrawal period.

name: Base Bridge (Native)
description: Native canonical bridge for Base (Coinbase L2). Built on OP Stack, shares architecture with Optimism bridge.

name: zkSync Bridge (Native)
description: Native canonical bridge for zkSync Era. Uses zero-knowledge proofs for verification. Deposits are fast, withdrawals require proof generation.

name: Scroll Bridge (Native)
description: Native canonical bridge for Scroll. Uses zkEVM with ZK proofs for verification.

name: Linea Bridge (Native)
description: Native canonical bridge for Linea (Consensys zkEVM). Uses zero-knowledge proofs for verification.

name: Mantle Bridge (Native)
description: Native canonical bridge for Mantle Network. Forked from OP Stack with modifications for MNT gas token.

name: Blast Bridge (Native)
description: Native canonical bridge for Blast L2. Deposits earn native yield via staking ETH (Lido) and lending stablecoins (MakerDAO T-Bills).
